name: bb_rsi_combined_caution
warning: Do not treat bb_touch and rsi_oversold as independent confirmation signals when both show identical 33.3% accuracy
reason: Both signals are firing together but failing together, suggesting correlated false signals rather than independent confirmation
regime_context: 혼조 (미국 위험선호 표면 유지 / 한국 위험회피 심화·구조적 자금이탈)
